> biosmr11 0x53
BIOSMR11: addr 0x53 MR11=0x07 (mode=1-byte page=7)

> biosinteresting 0x53
BIOSINTERESTING: addr 0x53
  MR11 before: 0x07
  MR11 page set: 0x01
  SPD[0x00D7] = 0x00
  SPD[0x00D9] = 0x00
  SPD[0x00DA] = 0x00
  SPD[0x00DB] = 0x00
  SPD[0x00DC] = 0x00
  MR11 after:  0x07

> biosdump 0x53 0x0000 256
